game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: An endless running game where players control a character running on three parallel train tracks, swiping left or right to change lanes, up to jump over obstacles, and down to slide under barriers. The game continuously scrolls forward at increasing speeds, spawning trains, barriers, and collectible coins at predetermined intervals that become more frequent and challenging over time.
game_info.description: Race through an endless subway tunnel on three parallel tracks! Dodge oncoming trains, jump over barriers, slide under overhead obstacles, and collect glowing coins. The game speeds up as you progress - how far can you run before crashing?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / A: Move to left track
Arrow Right / D: Move to right track
Arrow Up / W: Jump over obstacles
Arrow Down / S: Slide under barriers
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Resume
R: Restart to menu

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic lane switching mechanics and collision detection with trains. Verify that the player can move between all three lanes smoothly and that collisions with trains properly trigger game over.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Alternate between left and right lane changes while avoiding initial trains. Deliberately collide with a train after demonstrating successful lane switching to verify collision detection works correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should successfully switch lanes 10+ times without issues. When deliberately colliding with a train, the game should immediately transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Test passes if lane switching is responsive and collision detection is accurate.

TEST_1.expected: Player should successfully switch lanes 10+ times without issues. When deliberately colliding with a train, the game should immediately transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Test passes if lane switching is responsive and collision detection is accurate.

TEST_2.test_description: Test jumping and sliding mechanics against various obstacle types. Verify that jump timing allows clearing low barriers and sliding allows passing under high barriers.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Focus on jumping over low barriers and sliding under overhead obstacles. Test edge cases like jumping too early or too late, and attempting to jump when a slide is required.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully clear 15+ obstacles using appropriate actions (jump for low, slide for high). Verify that using wrong action (jumping for overhead barrier) causes collision. Test passes if jump/slide mechanics feel responsive and collision detection is precise.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully clear 15+ obstacles using appropriate actions (jump for low, slide for high). Verify that using wrong action (jumping for overhead barrier) causes collision. Test passes if jump/slide mechanics feel responsive and collision detection is precise.

TEST_3.test_description: Test coin collection mechanics and score tracking. Verify that coins are collectible, properly increment score, and are positioned consistently on tracks.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Collect 20+ coins successfully. Each coin should add to score (visible in UI). Coins should be collectible during all player states (running, jumping, sliding). Test passes if score tracking is accurate and collection is consistent.
TEST_3.description: Test coin collection mechanics and score tracking. Verify that coins are collectible, properly increment score, and are positioned consistently on tracks.
TEST_3.expected: Collect 20+ coins successfully. Each coin should add to score (visible in UI). Coins should be collectible during all player states (running, jumping, sliding). Test passes if score tracking is accurate and collection is consistent.

TEST_4.test_description: Test game speed progression system. Verify that the game gradually increases in difficulty by speeding up over time and that this progression feels fair and challenging.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Survive as long as possible without collecting coins or taking unnecessary risks. Focus purely on obstacle avoidance to observe speed changes over extended play time.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game should noticeably increase speed after 30+ seconds of play. Higher speeds should make obstacle avoidance more challenging but still possible with skill. Test passes if speed progression is smooth and difficulty curve feels balanced.

TEST_5.test_description: Test pause and restart functionality. Verify that ESC properly pauses/unpauses the game and that R key correctly restarts from game over state.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Pause game multiple times during play using ESC, verify game state freezes. After game over, use R to restart and confirm proper reset of all game elements.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: ESC should toggle between PLAYING and PAUSED states without issues. All game elements should freeze during pause. R key should reset game to START screen with score reset to 0. Test passes if all phase transitions work correctly.
TEST_5.description: Test pause and restart functionality. Verify that ESC properly pauses/unpauses the game and that R key correctly restarts from game over state.
TEST_5.strategy: Pause game multiple times during play using ESC, verify game state freezes. After game over, use R to restart and confirm proper reset of all game elements.
TEST_5.expected: ESC should toggle between PLAYING and PAUSED states without issues. All game elements should freeze during pause. R key should reset game to START screen with score reset to 0. Test passes if all phase transitions work correctly.

TEST_6.test_description: Test obstacle spawning patterns and variety. Verify that trains, barriers, and overhead obstacles spawn at appropriate intervals and create varied challenges.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Play for extended period observing obstacle patterns. Note if obstacles spawn on multiple lanes simultaneously and if different obstacle types appear in varied sequences.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Obstacles should spawn with increasing frequency as game progresses. Different obstacle types (trains, barriers, overhead) should appear in mixed patterns. No impossible obstacle combinations should spawn. Test passes if obstacle variety creates engaging gameplay without unfair situations.

TEST_7.test_description: Test win condition by achieving high score target. Verify that reaching 1000 points triggers win state and displays appropriate victory message.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Focus on collecting all coins while efficiently avoiding obstacles. Prioritize score accumulation over risky maneuvers. Aim to reach 1000 points to trigger win condition.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Upon reaching 1000 points, game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Victory screen should display final score and congratulatory message. Test passes if win condition triggers correctly and player can restart successfully.
